name: Strawberry Plush Rope Dog Toy - Boots & Barkley™
description:
Treat your pup to this Strawberry Plush Rope Dog Toy from Boots & Barkley™. This adorable heart-shaped strawberry toy features a charming design in red and pink with a green rope handle for tugging and tossing. The embroidered smiley face includes black eyes and mouth with tiny red hearts as cheeks for sweet touches. Made from PVC and polyester, this 6.63-inch toy is great for keeping them happily occupied and brings loads of fun to fetch, tug-of-war and independent play.

Boots & Barkley™: Because pets are just the best.
